name: Shinjuku Station West Exit Smoking Area
description: 24h designated outdoor smoking area with smoke-separation panels near the West Exit Rotary; nearest large official smoking zone to Kabukicho.

name: Cafe Renoir (Shinjuku TOHO Cinemas-mae)
description: Paid cafe inside Kabukicho (Kawashin Bldg 2F) with an indoor designated smoking section; requires a purchase to use.
gray_zone_note: Requires a paid purchase to use; not a free public smoking area.
